summary: Completed backend + frontend validation for auth, activity, builder navigation, three-pane resizing, prompt save/update, and user role management flows on public URL.

critical.issue: Authorization bypass risk: endpoints trust x-user-role/x-user-name headers and do not validate JWT via Authorization bearer token. Any client can forge role headers.

action_items: Enforce JWT-based auth on prompt/template CRUD endpoints (do not trust role headers from client).
Derive role and username from validated token server-side for /api/prompts and /api/templates mutations.
After auth hardening, retest builder save/update and template edit flows from UI.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses get_current_user_from_authorization for auth/me/activity/users, but templates/prompts mutation endpoints still authorize via x-user-role header only.
Security model is inconsistent across endpoints; internal login can be bypassed for sensitive writes unless JWT enforcement is applied uniformly.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all requested functional flows passed; one automation run had selector-script issue, then validated in focused rerun)

seed_data_creation: Created test users: test_user_<uuid>, test_editor_<uuid>, editor_1773403039, editor_1773403073. Created UI test drafts and cleaned API-created tracked prompt drafts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login/admin activity->builder navigation works. Builder compact header exists and three-pane resize drag changed pane width. Draft save/update works via UI. Admin user create + role update works. Non-admin Team Roles nav hidden and /users shows forbidden state. Focus retest after server-side auth hardening on prompts/templates endpoints.
rca of the issue: RCA: Role enforcement for prompts/templates relies on request headers x-user-role/x-user-name from frontend interceptor (api.js), not token claims. Repro: call /api/prompts POST with forged x-user-role=admin and no/invalid bearer token; endpoint path currently evaluates role header and allows action. Mitigation: require Authorization on all protected endpoints and resolve role/username only from decoded JWT claims.
